tokens: Apollo 14 Flight Journal - Index PageThe Apollo 14 Flight JournalDavid Woods, Ben Feist, Ronald Hansen, Johannes Kemppanen and Lennox J.

WaughWelcome to this 2 May 2025 release of theApollo 14 Flight Journal, part of theApollo Flight Journalseries.Like its companion, theApollo Lunar Surface Journal, it is intended to be a resource for all those interested in the Apollo program, whether in a passing or scholarly capacity.This journal covers the flight of Apollo 14 from launch to splashdown.
As aliving document, it will continue to grow and evolve.

Journals for other Apollo flights are available at theAFJ Portal.Travelling from the Earth to the MoonDay 1, part 1: The LaunchDay 1, part 2: Earth Orbit and Translunar InjectionDay 1, part 3: Transposition, Docking and ExtractionDay 1, part 4: Settling Down & NavigationDay 1, part 5: TV Troubleshoot & PTCDay 2, part 1: MCC-2 BurnDay 2, part 2: Sports News and MoreDay 3, part 1: Ground Elapsed Time UpdateDay 3, part 2: TV and LM HousekeepingIn...
